title: FiveSeasonStuff Artificial Flowers Dahlia Silk Flowers for Outdoors Indoors and Tall Vases 2 Stems (Soft Light Pink)
features: Our pink dahlia artificial flowers add special touches to home, wedding and bridal bouquets; these dahlias will bloom all year long; big blooms with natural gradient colors to match other flowers and greenery

Perfect as silk pink flowers for arrangements for the house or any occasion; dahlia stems are bendable and can be trimmed; length is about 72cm (28.3 inches) and suitable for placing in a tall vase, floor vase, as dining table centerpieces and for home decorations
One unique feature about our dahlia decorative pink artificial flowers is the leaves are detachable and attachable for different flower arranging needs
Height: dahlia long stems are about 72cm (28.3 inches) in length; flower head diameter: about 11 cm (14.3 inches)
What’s inside; 2 pink dahlias sealed in FiveSeasonStuff branded packaging; everything else in the photos is for reference only
description: Dahlias are perfect by themselves as artificial flowers for decoration and as faux flower arrangements for wedding, bridal and even as artificial flowers for graves. Relatives with sunflowers, daisies and chrysanthemum; dahlias have 42 different species; these fake flowers are decorative dahlias with double blooms and wide ray florets; flower heads adorned with rich silky petal layers. Material: flowers and leaves – silk cloth; stems - plastic and wires Notes: artificial daisies colour may vary due to differences in monitor displays. If unsure about a colour, image colour takes precedence over the colour name. During transit, some leaves may detach which is normal. If this happens, simply re-attach the artificial leaves. If placing outside as decoration or using as a flower for a grave or in a cemetery, exposure to the sun and external elements like rain, snow, and temperature will likely, in the long-term, affect the color to fade over time which is a normal process like for most artificial plants or fake plants.
